mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friends WHERE (user_id = #{userId} AND friend_user_id = #{friendUserId}) OR (user_id = #{friendUserId} AND friend_user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.face_image AS faceImage FROM users AS u INNER JOIN friends AS f ON u.id = f.friend_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId}
